hero.title: People Counting
hero.subtitle: Stop guessing, start using data. SmartCounter turns your CCTV cameras into an AI-powered people counting system — real-time visitor analytics, heatmaps, and demographic insights with 99.9% accuracy. Increase sales up to 40% with data-driven decisions.

painPoints.title: Still Counting Visitors Manually?
painPoints.subtitle: Here's what happens when you don't have accurate visitor data.

items.title: Revenue Not Maximized
items.desc: Without accurate foot traffic data, you can't identify peak hours, optimize promotions, or measure campaign ROI. Revenue opportunities slip through every day.

items.title: Inefficient Staffing
items.desc: Scheduling staff without knowing traffic patterns leads to overstaffing during slow hours and understaffing during peaks — wasting up to 30% of labor costs.

items.title: Suboptimal Layout
items.desc: Without heatmap and traffic flow data, you can't tell which zones attract customers and which are dead spots. Product placement is based on guesswork, not data.

features.title: 12+ AI-Powered Analytics Features
features.subtitle: From people counting to heatmap analytics — everything a CCTV AI system needs to transform your retail intelligence.

items.name: Visitor Traffic
items.desc: Monitor visitor count in real-time with 99.9% accuracy. Track entries, exits, and net foot traffic across all entrances — powered by AI computer vision.

items.name: In-Out Traffic
items.desc: Analyze visitor entry-exit patterns at any time. Understand peak hours, compare day-over-day trends, and measure the impact of promotions on foot traffic.

items.name: Dwell Time
items.desc: Measure how long visitors spend in your store or specific zones. Longer dwell time correlates with higher conversion and engagement.

items.name: Passers-by
items.desc: Count potential visitors passing by your store entrance. Measure your capture rate and optimize storefront displays to attract more walk-ins.

items.name: Entering Rate
items.desc: Conversion rate from passers-by to actual visitors. Understand how effective your storefront, signage, and promotions are at driving foot traffic.

items.name: Group Rate
items.desc: Identify group or individual visit patterns. Understand whether customers shop alone or in groups to optimize your service approach and space layout.

items.name: Demographic
items.desc: Complete age and gender visitor profiles without collecting personal data. Privacy-compliant AI computer vision for targeted marketing decisions.

items.name: Occupancy
items.desc: Store capacity and real-time density levels. Ensure safety compliance, manage crowd flow, and trigger alerts when thresholds are exceeded.

items.name: Service Efficiency
items.desc: Evaluate staff service speed and efficiency. Align staffing levels with visitor traffic patterns to reduce wait times and labor costs.

items.name: Heatmap
items.desc: Visualize busiest areas for layout optimization. AI-powered CCTV heatmaps show hot zones, dead zones, and customer movement patterns in real spatial data.

items.name: Queuing
items.desc: Queue management and customer wait time tracking. Detect queue lengths, trigger alerts, and improve checkout efficiency with real-time data.

items.name: In-Store Routes
items.desc: Map visitor journey paths inside your store. Understand entry-to-exit movement, identify high-traffic corridors, and optimize product placement.

heatmap.title: See Where Your Customers Go
heatmap.desc: SmartCounter's AI camera analytics turn raw CCTV footage into actionable heatmap intelligence. Our computer vision processes millions of data points into clear overlays on your actual store floor plan.
bullets: Real-time overlay on your actual store floor plan
Compare peak vs off-peak patterns side by side
Identify dead zones and optimize product placement

useCases.title: People Counting for Every Retail Format
useCases.subtitle: From boutique fashion to large shopping malls, SmartCounter's CCTV AI adapts to your space and counting requirements.

items.name: Retail & Department Store
items.desc: Optimize product layout and increase sales conversion with accurate footfall data. Align staffing with peak hours across every outlet.

items.name: Mall & Shopping Center
items.desc: Understand tenant traffic patterns and optimize marketing strategy for each zone. Floor-level occupancy and tenant benchmarking.

items.name: Fashion & Boutique
items.desc: Identify favorite products with heatmap and enhance visual merchandising. Track fitting room conversion and campaign impact.

items.name: Pharmacy & Healthcare
items.desc: Manage patient queues more efficiently and improve service quality with queuing analytics. Optimize pharmacist scheduling.

items.name: Supermarket & Minimarket
items.desc: Schedule staffing based on peak hours and reduce operational costs. Aisle-level traffic flow and checkout queue management.

items.name: Luxury & Premium Store
items.desc: Deliver personalized experience with demographic insights and service efficiency. Privacy-compliant clienteling analytics.

coverage.title: Trusted by Modern Retail Industries
coverage.subtitle: for Intelligent Visitor Analytics — deployed across Indonesia

packages.subtitle: Three tiers designed for every retail scale. All include hardware and installation.

items.name: Add-On

items.name: Premium

faqItems.a: SmartCounter uses sensors and AI computer vision to detect and track visitors in real-time with 99.9% accuracy. Data flows directly to your dashboard without any delay.
Not at all! Our technician team will handle the entire installation process. Average installation is completed in 1-2 business days and ready to use immediately.

faqItems.q: Is visitor data secure and privacy compliant?
faqItems.a: Absolutely! SmartCounter only counts and analyzes movement patterns without recording personal identity. 100% compliant with data privacy regulations.

faqItems.q: How long does it take to achieve ROI?
faqItems.a: Most of our clients achieve ROI within 3-6 months through operational efficiency, layout optimization, and increased sales conversion.

faqItems.q: Is there training available for using the dashboard?
faqItems.a: Yes! We provide comprehensive training for your team. Our dashboard is also designed to be user-friendly, easy to learn even without technical background.

faqItems.q: Is it suitable for small stores or only for large retail?
faqItems.a: SmartCounter is suitable for all business sizes! Our Basic package is designed specifically for single stores, while Add-On and Premium packages are for larger operations.
